{{Missing Info}}

==Bibini Bottom==
Bibini Bottom is the 2nd map within the [[Mysterious Sea]] of [[Britland]]. Unlock Bibini Bottom by completing the [[Britland Key Clues#Lost Nautical Charts|Britland Key Clue "Bibini Bottom Map"]]. 

===Other Seas===
{|class="wikitable"
! [[Pirate Paradise]]
! Bibini Bottom
! [[Mecha Sea]]
! [[Poseidon Temple]]
! [[Dragon Palace]]
! [[Doomsday Sea]]
|}

==Floor 1==
'''Starting Tile''' 7
'''Clear Cost''' 20 Bronze Coins per mist

[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.25.png|200px|left]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.5.png|200px]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|2
|Smack of Jellyfish
|759
|130
|Silver +16
|-
|16
|
|3,784
|239
|Gold +8<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|18
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,012
|95
|Silver +21
|-
|19
|Smack of Jellyfish
|868
|113
|Silver +18
|-
|21
|Smack of Jellyfish
|934
|104
|Silver +19
|-
|29
|
|3,784
|239
|Gold +10<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|32
|Smack of Jellyfish
|759
|130
|Silver +16
|-
|35
|Smack of Jellyfish
|810
|121
|Silver +17
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|16
|
|33,806
|26,585
|610,003
|FAME 10,421
|NAV Gold Coin +8
|-
|29
|
|1
|1
|10
|FAME 1
|NAV Gold Coin +10
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|1
|Drift Bottle
| -
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +2|purple}}
|-
|6
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|?<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +2k}}
|-
|12
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|15
|Recent Ruins
|Archeology Lv.1
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Boy with Goose|purple}} +5
|-
|26
|Statue
|10,900 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|36
|Stranded Ship
|10,400 ART
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +5}}
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +8
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|INTEL, +50}}<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +200}}
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 2==
'''Starting Tile''' 34
'''Clear Cost''' 20 Bronze Coin per mist

[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.25.png|200px|left]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 2.5.png|200px]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|2
|
|4,677
|295
|Gold +10<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|15
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,067
|181
|Silver +22
|-
|17
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,138
|169
|Silver +23
|-
|20
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,313
|145
|Silver +27
|-
|24
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,423
|133
|Silver +29
|-
|25
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,138
|169
|Silver +23
|-
|26
|Smack of Jellyfish
|4,677
|295
|Gold +20
|-
|27
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,219
|157
|Silver +25
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|16
|
|33,433
|26,323
|608,006
|FAME 10,351
|NAV Gold Coin +10
|-
|26
|Octopus
|34,830
|27,362
|644,788
|FAME 10,603
|NAV Gold Coin +20
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|6
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|9
|Stranded Ship
|10,500 ART
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +5}}
|-
|12
|Statue
|10,600 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|13
|
|Fishing Lv.2
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Taichi Fish, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +3k}}
|-
|31
|Drift Bottle
| -
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map, +3}}
|-
|36
|Seashore Placer
|Exploration Lv.1
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +600}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1k}}
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|INTEL, +50}}<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +200}}
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 3==
'''Starting Tile''' 7
'''Clear Cost''' 30 Bronze Coin per mist

[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.25.png|200px|left]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 3.5.png|200px]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|2
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,643
|211
|Silver +33
|-
|10
|
|7,357
|464
|Gold +30<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|12
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,533
|227
|Silver +31
|-
|15
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,437
|243
|Silver +29
|-
|28
|
|7,953
|501
|Gold +12<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|30
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,916
|179
|Silver +39
|-
|32
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,643
|211
|Silver +33
|-
|35
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,769
|195
|Silver +36
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|10
|Crab
|36,118
|28,366
|718,497
|FAME 10,840
|NAV Gold Coin +30
|-
|28
|Whale
|36,728
|28,849
|751,451
|FAME 10,961
|NAV Gold Coin +12
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|5
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|?<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +3k}}
|-
|6
|Drift Bottle
| -
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +2|purple}}
|-
|14
|Seashore Placer
|Exploration Lv.1
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +600}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1k}}
|-
|19
|Crab Restaurant
| -
|Shop
|-
|27
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|29
|
|Treasure Hunting Lv.2
|{{RewardIconWithText|Crabby Burger, +10}}
|-
|31
|Stranded Ship
|10,700 ART
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +5}}
|}
|-|Crab Restaurant=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
!Item
!Price
!Quantity
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Crabby Burger}}
|1,500 Silver Coins
|20
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest}}
|1,000 Silver Coins
|10
|-
|
|10,000 Gold Coins
|1
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +12
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|INTEL, +50}}<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +200}}
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 4==
'''Starting Tile''' 24
'''Clear Cost''' 40 Bronze Coins per mist

[[File:Mysterious Sea Bibini Bottom 4 Full.jpg|200px|left]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.25.png|200px]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 4.5.png|200px]]
{{clear}}
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|3
|Lobsters
|8,599
|542
|Gold +15<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|7
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,137
|274
|Silver +43
|-
|12
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,302
|253
|Silver +47
|-
|15
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,995
|295
|Silver +40
|-
|20
|Smack of Jellyfish
|1,870
|316
|Silver +38
|-
|28
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,493
|232
|Silver +50
|-
|32
|Swarm of Sea Slugs
|9,245
|582
|Gold +40<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|36
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,302
|253
|Silver +47
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|3
|Lobster
|36,728
|28,849
|751,451
|FAME 10,961
|NAV Gold Coin +15
|-
|32
|
|36,423
|28,607
|725,073
|FAME 10,901
|NAV Gold Coin +40
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|6
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|8
|Stranded Ship
|10,300 ART
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +5}}
|-
|16
|Prophet Hut
|10,800 CIV
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent, +1|orange}}
|-
|27
|
|Fishing Lv.2
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Taichi Fish, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +3k}}
|-
|34
|
|Archeology Lv.2
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Phoenician Tablet, +5|purple}}
|-
|35
|Drift Bottle
| -
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map, +3}}
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +14
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|INTEL, +50}}<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +200}}
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 5==
'''Starting Tile''' 6
'''Clear Cost''' 50 Bronze Coins per mist

[[File:Bibini Bottom 5 complete.jpg|200px|left]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.25.png|200px]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 5.5.png|200px]]
{{clear}}
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|2
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,365
|399
|Silver +48
|-
|10
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,154
|292
|Silver +64
|-
|13
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,911
|319
|Silver +59
|-
|17
|Swarm of Starfish
|11,383
|716
|Gold +50<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|21
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,523
|372
|Silver +51
|-
|24
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,703
|346
|Silver +55
|-
|33
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,154
|292
|Silver +64
|-
|35
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,365
|399
|Silver +48
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|17
|Starfish
|38,153
|29,927
|836,016
|FAME 11,204
|NAV Gold Coin +50
|-
|17
|Giant Starfish
|39,577
|31,004
|923,421
|FAME 11,447
|NAV Gold Coin +50<br>Wish Coin +3
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|1
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|3
|Recent Ruins
|Archeology Lv.1
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nefertiti Bust, +5 Fragments|purple}}
|-
|8
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|?<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +2k}}
|-
|20
|Prophet Hut
|11,250 CIV
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent, +1|orange}}
|-
|30
|Staue
|11,000 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}
|-
|36
|Drift Bottle
| -
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +2|purple}}
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +16
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|INTEL, +50}}<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +200}}
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 6==
'''Starting Tile''' 31
'''Clear Cost''' 2 Silver Coins per mist

[[File:Bibini Bottom 6 complete.jpg|200px|left]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 1.25.png|200px]]
[[File:Bibini Bottom 6.5.png|200px]]
{{clear}}
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|1
|Swarm of Sponges
|14,567
|916
|Gold +60<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|SpongeRob, +5 Fragments|green}}
|-
|8
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,118
|459
|Silver +63
|-
|11
|School of Porcupinefish
|10,637
|669
|Gold +18<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +10}}
|-
|13
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,897
|361
|Silver +78
|-
|17
|Smack of Jellyfish
|2,923
|492
|Silver +59
|-
|22
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,597
|394
|Silver +72
|-
|26
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,118
|459
|Silver +63
|-
|30
|Smack of Jellyfish
|3,341
|426
|Silver +67
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|1
|Sponge
|38,899
|30,484
|883,474
|FAME 11,326
|NAV Gold Coin +60
|-
|11
|Porcupinefish
|38,153
|29,927
|836,016
|FAME 11,204
|NAV Gold Coin +18
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|6
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|10
|
|Fishing Lv.2
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Taichi Fish, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +3k}}
|-
|18
|Drift Bottle
| -
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map, +3}}
|-
|21
|
|Archeology Lv.2
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Hermes' Coin, +5 Fragments|purple}}
|-
|35
|Stranded Ship
|11,200 ART
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, +5}}
|-
|36
|Miracle Conch
|Treasure Hunting Lv.1
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Miracle Conch, +5 Fragments|green}}
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +18
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +80}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|INTEL, +50}}<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +1|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +200}}
|}
</tabber>

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Britland]]
